name: Bob Mintzer
description: American jazz saxophonist, composer, arranger, and big band leader
abstract: Robert Alan Mintzer (born January 27, 1953) is an American jazz saxophonist, composer, arranger, and big band leader.

concerts.label: Newport Jazz Festival: Harry James and His Orchestra, Buddy Rich and His Band, and the Ruby Braff-George Barnes Quartet

works_created.t: Saxophone Quartet No. 1 in Three Movements

about_quotes.speaker: Mike Davis
about_quotes.evidence: I kind of learned that from my years of a couple of decades of being in Bob Mintzer’s band
about_quotes.doc_title: Mike Davis interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, April 1, 2024

about_quotes.speaker: Peter Erskine
about_quotes.evidence: Peter Erskine has performed and recorded with a lengthy list of ensembles and solo artists including the big bands of Stan Kenton and Bob Mintzer
about_quotes.doc_title: Peter Erskine interviewed by Monk Rowe, New Orleans, Louisiana, January 9, 2020

about_quotes.speaker: Karolina Strassmayer
about_quotes.evidence: I think often about how much music we have played over the years that would have never — wouldn’t exist if it weren’t for this because this music is always or almost always commissioned for the band. So this music wouldn’t exist if somebody here in the West German radio wouldn’t take money and say t
about_quotes.doc_title: Karolina Strassmayer interviewed by Monk Rowe, May 25, 2023

about_quotes.speaker: David Weiss
about_quotes.evidence: I think Bob Belden did one or two and Bob Mintzer did a couple. And they threw me a couple. And that’s the first time I think I wrote for that size band and I liked it.
about_quotes.doc_title: David Weiss interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, May 3, 2022

about_quotes.speaker: Harry Allen
about_quotes.evidence: We had some awfully good instructors — ... and on sax we had a different saxophone instructor every year — Sahib Shihab was one, Bob Mintzer was another
about_quotes.doc_title: Harry Allen interviewed by Monk Rowe, Chautauqua, New York, September 13, 1997

about_quotes.speaker: Sherrie Maricle
about_quotes.evidence: I don’t know he’s got all these like stars chiming in for a session because he doesn’t have to fly them anywhere. ... Bob Mintzer
about_quotes.doc_title: Sherrie Maricle interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, June 4, 2020 [interview 2 of 2]
